Name: Name
footer.description: Open source VoIP telephony management platform powered by Asterisk, with built-in AI agent.
hero.badge: Open source · 5-minute install · Powered by Asterisk
hero.sub: Voxa Center makes VoIP accessible to everyone. Design your call flows with drag & drop, manage your lines in a few clicks — without ever touching a config file.
trust.title: Compatible with your SIP operators
features.label: Features
features.title:
Design your telephony,
forget config files
features.desc: Voxa Center replaces the complexity of Asterisk with a visual interface. Drag, connect, it's in production.
features.callflows.title: Visual call flows
features.callflows.desc: Design your call paths with drag & drop: ring, IVR, queues, schedules, forwarding, AI Agent, text-to-speech. No config file needed.
features.sip.title: SIP Lines & Trunks
features.sip.desc: Create your lines and connect your operators in a few clicks. Outbound proxy, automatic registration, configurable codecs.
features.softphone.title: WebRTC Softphone
features.softphone.desc: Built-in phone in the operator panel. Make and receive calls directly from your browser.
features.dashboard.title: Dashboard & Monitoring
features.dashboard.desc: 7-day statistics, live call supervision, CDR journal, missed calls by extension, duration by operator.
features.firewall.title: Firewall & Security
features.firewall.desc: IP whitelist / blacklist, automatic brute-force protection, 3 configurable security modes, SRTP/TLS encryption.
features.queues.title: Queues, Conferences & MOH
features.queues.desc: Configurable queues, conference rooms, voicemail with email notification, music on hold.
features.tts.title: Local text-to-speech
features.tts.desc: Piper TTS with 3 French voices. Audio preview directly in the flow editor. No cloud required.
features.operators.title: Operators & Caller ID
features.operators.desc: Operator accounts with role management, admin impersonation, outbound numbers and access groups per operator.
features.ai.title: AI voice agent
features.ai.desc: Add an OpenAI Realtime conversational agent to your flows. Full-duplex, 8 voices, guardrails, RAG knowledge base.
ai.label: Go further
ai.title: Add an AI voice agent to your call flows
ai.desc: Beyond the simplicity of the visual editor, integrate an OpenAI Realtime conversational agent. Your callers interact with a voice AI, just like a human.
arch.title: Asterisk 20, native installation
arch.desc: All services — including Asterisk compiled from source — run natively on your server. Compatible with Debian 12, Ubuntu 22.04 and 24.04.
pricing.title:
Free software,
professional services
pricing.desc: Voxa Center is 100% free with all features. Our paid services support you in production.
pricing.free.desc: All features included, no restrictions. Self-hosted on your Debian/Ubuntu server.
stack.title: Proven technologies
stack.desc: Each component is chosen for its reliability in telecom production.
cta.title:
Your telephony takes shape
in minutes
cta.desc: Install Voxa Center for free on your Debian or Ubuntu server.
Selectionnez une date pour voir les cren: Select a date to see available slots
Aucun creneau disponible ce jour (ferme): No slots available on this day (closed)
Tous les creneaux sont pris, choisissez: All slots are taken, choose another date

scenarios.title: Design your call flows,
scenarios.title.highlight: without writing a single config line
scenarios.sub: Voxa Center replaces the complexity of Asterisk with a visual editor. Drag blocks, connect them, and your call path is in production — instantly.
scenarios.blocks.label: Available blocks
scenarios.blocks.title: 12 blocks to compose
scenarios.blocks.desc: Each block corresponds to a telephony action. Combine them to create call flows as simple or complex as you need.
scenarios.block.appel_entrant.desc: Entry point of the call flow. Automatic trigger by DID number or Asterisk context.
scenarios.block.horaires.desc: Open/closed branch with green/red visual ports. Manage holidays and exceptions.
scenarios.block.ivr.desc: Interactive voice menu with DTMF key branches. Configurable loop and timeout.
scenarios.block.sonnerie.desc: Rings one or more extensions simultaneously or sequentially. Configurable timeout.
scenarios.block.file_attente.desc: Asterisk queue with strategies (ring all, round robin, random), music on hold and timeout.
scenarios.block.agent_ia.desc: OpenAI Realtime conversational agent. Full-duplex, 8 voices, RAG knowledge base.
scenarios.block.tts.desc: Local Piper TTS with 3 French voices. Audio preview directly in the editor.
scenarios.block.messagerie.desc: Voicemail with SMTP email notification. Listen and delete from the interface.
scenarios.block.renvoi.desc: Redirects the call to an external number, another extension, or another call flow.
scenarios.block.moh.desc: Local files, custom playlists, or HTTP streaming via ffmpeg.
scenarios.block.conference.desc: ConfBridge conference room. PIN code access, moderator, recording.
scenarios.block.raccrocher.desc: Ends the call cleanly. Optional — by default, the last block hangs up.
scenarios.steps.label: Simple as 1-2-3
scenarios.steps.title: Create a call flow in 3 steps
scenarios.steps.desc: No extensions.conf file to edit, no dialplan to debug. Everything is done in the interface.
scenarios.step1.title: Drag your blocks
scenarios.step1.desc: Choose the blocks you need from the palette: schedule, IVR, queue, AI agent, ring... Drop them onto the canvas.
scenarios.step2.title: Connect them
scenarios.step2.desc: Link blocks together by dragging connections. Each connection represents a call path. IVR and schedule branches automatically create ports.
scenarios.step3.title: It's in production
scenarios.step3.desc: Voxa Center automatically generates the Asterisk dialplan, pushes it to the Realtime database, and reloads the configuration — no restart needed.
scenarios.cta.title: Ready to design your telephony?
scenarios.cta.desc: Install Voxa Center for free or contact us for guidance.
softphone.title: A softphone
softphone.sub: Make and receive calls directly from the Voxa Center interface. No installation, no plugin — just your browser and a headset.
softphone.features.label: Features
softphone.features.title: Everything a professional
softphone.features.desc: The Voxa Center WebRTC softphone is built into the operator panel. Each operator has their phone directly in their browser.
softphone.feat.calls.title: Inbound & outbound calls
softphone.feat.calls.desc: Make and receive VoIP calls from any modern browser. Compatible with Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari.
softphone.feat.encryption.title: DTLS-SRTP encryption
softphone.feat.encryption.desc: All audio streams are end-to-end encrypted via DTLS-SRTP. Automatic ICE negotiation for NAT traversal.
softphone.feat.transfer.title: Call transfer
softphone.feat.transfer.desc: Transfer an active call to another extension, external number, or queue — in one click.
softphone.feat.recording.title: On-the-fly recording
softphone.feat.recording.desc: Start recording during a call (MixMonitor). Files are accessible from the admin interface.
softphone.feat.callerid.title: Dynamic Caller ID
softphone.feat.callerid.desc: Each operator can select their outbound number from the numbers authorized by their access group.
softphone.feat.notifications.title: Browser notifications
softphone.feat.notifications.desc: Receive a sound and visual notification for each incoming call, even if the tab is in the background.
softphone.stack.label: Tech stack
softphone.stack.title: Native WebRTC,
softphone.stack.desc: The softphone relies on JsSIP and standard browser WebRTC APIs. Asterisk handles SIP signaling via WebSocket.
softphone.cta.title: Ready to call from your browser?
softphone.cta.desc: Install Voxa Center and enable the WebRTC softphone in a few clicks.
cookie.text: This site uses technical cookies (session, security) and internal analytics cookies (visitor statistics). No data is shared with third parties.
contact.left.desc: Whether you need turnkey hosting, installation help, or custom development — we adapt our offer to your infrastructure.
contact.left.hosting.title: Turnkey hosting
contact.left.hosting.desc: Voxa Center pre-installed, maintained and monitored on a dedicated server. Nothing for you to manage.
contact.left.install.title: Assisted installation
contact.left.install.desc: We install and configure Voxa Center on your Debian/Ubuntu server with your SIP trunks.
contact.left.support.title: Technical support
contact.left.support.desc: Monthly follow-up, monitoring, security updates, configuration assistance and debugging.
contact.left.custom.title: Custom development
contact.left.custom.desc: Custom features, CRM/ERP integrations, AI agents specific to your business.
contact.form.sub: Fill out this form — we'll get back to you within 24h to schedule your session.
contact.form.desc.placeholder: Briefly describe your project, current infrastructure and expectations...
contact.page.desc: Our team helps you set up Voxa Center. Hosting, installation, support — we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
ai.feat.duplex: Full-duplex audio — the caller can interrupt the AI naturally
ai.feat.voices: 8 voices: Coral, Alloy, Ash, Echo, Sage, Shimmer, Verse, Ballad
ai.feat.rag: RAG knowledge base — your documents provide context to the agent
ai.feat.guardrails: Automatic guardrails — topic scoping, no AI disclosure
ai.feat.history: Searchable history — full transcription and estimated cost
ai.feat.billing: Billing dashboard — budget tracking by day / week / month
ai.feat.duplex_bar: Bidirectional full-duplex audio across the entire chain
arch.label: Architecture
arch.systemd_detail: Fail2ban · Let's Encrypt · Queue Worker · Cron · Managed services
